name: style-numpr-override
description: Direct numPr overrides style numPr. Style 'NumberedStyle' has numPr (numId=1, bullets). P1 uses style only (bullets). P2 uses style + direct numPr (numId=2, decimal).
expected_behavior: P1: bullet numbering (from style numId=1). P2: decimal numbering '1.' (from direct numId=2, overrides style).
